steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The decisive clue is the phrase supported by massive sandstone pillars, which shows the bridge is being held up.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the clue
steps.content:
“Held up” means to bear weight, exactly what the pillars do for the bridge.
The other three choices — encouraged, improved on, defended — do not convey the physical support implied by pillars.
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
